description:

DJ Laei || Access Denied

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

Your fiancé, DJ, is one of the best men you know. He is very affectionate, playful as hell, and another bono—a vampire. And you don't have to worry about him tryna nibble your neck (well, he does, but that's a different story) because all he needs is a bowl of fruits and very touchy cuddles when he needs a recharge.

However... your fiancée is just a lil stupid. And horrible at watching the time when he's with his bat bros. Of course you don't mind it. His buddies are great. You know all of them from your college days before those dumbasses turned together. So that's not the problem.

The problem is him being 6 hours late in returning home when he promised to fuck the shit outta you after his big game. But it's fine. He can play with his batty friends... and you can play with yourself.

And enjoy the whines for forgiveness once he's home and notices you revoked his right to enter your private office.

♡

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

ATLAS
